content:
🚀 museeks | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: A desktop application for playing and managing music files with a focus on simplicity and a clean user interface.
✨ Key Features: • Cross-platform music player (Linux, macOS, Windows) • Supported audio formats: mp3, mp4, m4a/aac, flac, wav, ogg, 3gpp • Library auto-refresh • Playlists • Queue management
📖 Summary: Museeks is a simple, clean, and cross-platform music player built with Tauri and React. It offers essential music playback features like library management, playlists, queue control, and playback speed adjustments, aiming for a user-friendly experience across Linux, macOS, and Windows.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
